title: Compound - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls drip() on Compound’s Reservoir vault within a short timeframe after a governance proposal passes
prevention.trigger: GOVERNANCE_PROPOSAL_PASS -> drip() on RESERVOIR_VAULT in single tx

red_flags: drip() call on Reservoir vault shortly after governance proposal passes
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls drip() on Compound’s Reservoir vault within a short timeframe after a governance proposal passes
summary: A governance proposal on Compound led to the refilling of the Comptroller vault, which allowed for further incorrect COMP distribution. A subsequent attack exploited this vulnerability, leading to significant losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring governance proposal passes and subsequent calls to the drip() function.
